title: The Fog at Blackwater Docks
summary: A missing courier, a sealed crate, and too many witnesses who saw nothing.

inventory.name: Iron Lantern
inventory.description: A sturdy lantern that brightens the darkest corners.

inventory.name: Wax Seal Fragment
inventory.description: Evidence tied to the abbey archives.

inventory.name: Oil Vial
inventory.description: A small vial of lamp oil reclaimed from the docks.

inventory.name: Crowbar
inventory.description: A heavy crowbar used by stevedores to pry open crates.

memoryCards.title: Blackwater Docks
memoryCards.content: The docks are always foggy at night; locals blame old ship fires.

start.prompt: Night. Fog curls around the pilings. A lantern swings on a hook, unmanned. The harbormaster's office is dark—except for one thin line of light under the door. A damp tapestry and faded drapes billow beside a sealed crate that reeks of old wax.
